LAW AND MOTION 302, RE: DEFENDANT GARUDA LABS, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL INDIVIDUAL ARBITRATION, DISMISS PUTATIVE CLASS CLAIMS, AND STAY PROCEEDINGS. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GARUDA LABS, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL INDIVIDUAL ARBITRATION, DISMISS PUTATIVE CLASS CLAIMS, AND STAY PROCEEDINGS IS GRANTED AS UNOPPOSED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/CK) ***AFTER HEARING, AN ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-09-2025 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Lee Sheldon, Esq. appeared for defendant. Pursuant to defendant's request, the court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. Judge: Samuel K. Feng; Clerk: D. Diaz; Not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-08-2025 Continued To Dec-09-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: LEE SHELDON, Esq. appeared for defendant. Defendant mentioned plaintiff's counsel has been unresponsive. The Court orders the case dismissed. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk: D. Diaz; Not reported. (610)

After further review, the court vacates the prior order dismissing the case. DAVID LAVI, esq. is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Dec-9-2025 at 10:30AM in Department 610. (610)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Individual Arbitration, Dismiss Putative Class Claims, And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Jul-28-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Defendant Garuda Labs, Inc.'s motion to compel individual arbitration, dismiss putative class claims, and stay proceedings.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Garuda Labs, Inc.'s motion to compel individual arbitration, dismiss putative class claims, and stay proceedings is granted as unopposed.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not reported. (302/CK)
